name: fccview-degoog-extensions
description: Experimental test fork — not stable: do not rely on this repo for production. Plugins, themes, engines, and transports for degoog search. Maintained by LukasSor.
author: LukasSor (https://github.com/LukasSor)

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.description: Shows weather information using Open-Meteo.

plugins.name: Define
plugins.description: Look up word definitions using the Free Dictionary API.

plugins.name: Time
plugins.description: Show current time in a timezone or city.

plugins.name: QR Code
plugins.description: Generate a QR code for a URL.

plugins.name: Password
plugins.description: Generate a random password.

plugins.name: Search history
plugins.description: Stores search history in data/history.json with timestamps; !history shows a paginated, deletable list.

plugins.name: TMDb
plugins.description: Shows movie/TV show details above search results.

plugins.name: Math
plugins.description: Evaluates math expressions and shows the result above search results.

plugins.name: Snake
plugins.description: Snake: score + pause; overlay menu; full-width grid; keys/edge taps; actions styled like !coinflip / !number.

plugins.name: Minesweeper
plugins.description: Minesweeper command game with Time/Flags header and settings for difficulty and theme.

plugins.name: Coin flip
plugins.description: 3D coin flip card: !coinflip / !flip with spin animation, result under the coin, spin again in place.

plugins.name: Random number
plugins.description: RNG card: !random / !rng with min/max, optional decimals and decimal places, comma-formatted fractions.

plugins.name: Jellyfin
plugins.description: Search your Jellyfin media library.

plugins.name: Meilisearch
plugins.description: Search across your Meilisearch indexes.

plugins.name: Home RSS Feeds
plugins.description: Shows RSS feed items above search results.

plugins.name: GitHub
plugins.description: When search results include GitHub repos or users, shows styled info above results.

plugins.name: Result date badges
plugins.description: Date badges on web results (snippet, title, time, URL path). New folder name avoids install clash with an old result-dates folder.

plugins.name: File tab results
plugins.description: Adds a Files tab to search results that finds downloadable files via file-type engines.

plugins.name: Torrent tab results
plugins.description: Torrents tab: The Pirate Bay (apibay), SolidTorrents API, and Nyaa (general + East Asian media). Use only for lawful content.

plugins.name: Full Map
plugins.description: Large OpenStreetMap tab with a place list, interactive markers, and place detail cards with optional Wikipedia media/context. Tripadvisor key: Settings → Engines → Maps → Full Map (Tripadvisor) → Configure.

transports.name: FlareSolverr
transports.description: Bypass Cloudflare challenges via a FlareSolverr instance. Once configured, engines can select flaresolverr as their outgoing transport.

engines.name: Full Map (Tripadvisor)
engines.description: Stores the Tripadvisor Content API key and optional preferred location for the Full Map tab. Appears under Settings → Engines in the Maps section (not Web); returns no search results — leave disabled as a default engine.

engines.name: Ecosia
engines.description: Adds the Ecosia engine to degoog. Note: Ecosia may return no results when Cloudflare blocks server-side requests; use another engine if that happens.

engines.name: Startpage
engines.description: Adds the Startpage engine to degoog. You can enable Anonymous View so result links open via Startpage's proxy.

engines.name: Internet Archive
engines.description: Adds the Internet Archive as a file-type engine. Searches archive.org for downloadable files, books, software, media, and more.

engines.name: Lemmy World
engines.description: Adds the Lemmy engine to degoog. Searches Lemmy.world for posts, comments, and communities.

engines.name: Brave API Search
engines.description: Adds the Brave API Search engine to degoog. Searches Brave.com for search results via the api instead of scraping the frontend.

engines.name: DuckDuckGo Images
engines.description: Adds the DuckDuckGo images search engine to degoog, adding an extra ~70 images per page to the image results.

engines.name: Nyaa
engines.description: Torrent search via Nyaa.si RSS (categories include anime, manga, audio, literature, live action, pictures, software). Use only for content you may legally download or share.

engines.name: The Pirate Bay (apibay)
engines.description: General torrent search via apibay.org (mirrors The Pirate Bay index). Result links open thepiratebay.org; magnet in snippet. Third-party API may lag or stop working.

engines.name: SolidTorrents
engines.description: General torrent search via solidtorrents.to JSON API with pagination. Result URLs are magnet links when a hash is present.
